human_approval_required_for: claiming work is complete without running verification commands
accepting mocked test evidence for integration-level success criteria
five_step_gate: identify — list what specifically must be verified
run — execute verification commands against real code
read — read actual command output, do not assume
verify — confirm output matches success criterion
claim — only now say 'verify phase complete'

boundaries.produces: evidence-before-assertions discipline at workflow phase verify
boundaries.does_not_produce: the tests themselves (workflow execute phase produces them)
